final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period, in a single large card layout with cartoon illustration storytelling style.

Style/medium: flat cartoon illustration infographic, colorful storybook aesthetic, clean editorial layout inspired by children's educational posters
Composition: single large vertical card, bold title banner at top, cartoon story scene as the central illustration, bullet-point key facts panel arranged alongside the illustration
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) — key figures include Cao Cao's massive navy fleet, Zhou Yu and Zhuge Liang on the allied side; fire ships attacking the chained fleet as the climactic scene
Scene/backdrop: the Yangtze River at night, flames engulfing a fleet of warships, dramatic but child-friendly and non-frightening
Lighting/mood: warm orange and red firelight glow over the river, exciting and adventurous mood suitable for young readers
Color palette: warm reds and oranges for the fire scene as hero colors, deep navy blue for the river, bright yellow for title banner, clean white card background
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title "赤壁之战" must be large and clearly legible at the top; key story points listed with bullet markers beside the illustration; all text and visual elements must be child-friendly and age-appropriate; card must read as a single cohesive layout
Avoid: realistic gore or violence, overly complex linework, dark or frightening imagery, cluttered layout, adult editorial style
